title: Temporal Extent
description: Period during which data was collected, observations were made, or for which the model was run.

definitions.definition: Period during which data was collected, observations were made, or for which the model was run.
definitions.notes:
- In W3C this is the definition of temporal coverage.
- Time Period covered by a series of observations inclusive of the specified date/time indications (measurement history). Defined based on the beginning and end dates of observations.
